survivorship_bias.note: Full universe retained across the window; no winners-only selection.

selection_bias.note: Hedge universe ranked on in-sample data only; no peeking at test folds.

transaction_cost_bias.note: Spot and option fees (incl. cap) charged on every trade.

look_ahead.note: Walk-forward folds with purge/embargo; per-slice calibration is contemporaneous.
